title: Golfnbud
compiled_truth: Golfnbud is an external contact at [AOL](companies/aol). Over the corpus period (2000-09-04 to 2001-09-30), Golfnbud sent 2 and received 55 emails, totalling 57 interactions. Top correspondents: [Smu-Betas](people/smu-betas-yahoogroups) (2), [Luckylizzy](people/luckylizzy-worldnet) (1), [Bmahaffay](people/bmahaffay-aol) (1), [Noidandjen](people/noidandjen-aol) (1), [Tielnut](people/tielnut-optonline) (1).
